violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Packages of raw chicken were stored over a package of raw ground beef in the walk in cooler.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. A flat of shell eggs, removed from the original container was stored over a container of lettuce and salad playltes in the reach in cooler by the hand sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of paper hand towels was stored on the floor in the back stockroom.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. White foam containers on the shelf above the chest freezer in the kitchen were not inverted.
